content.json:
# KMP Telemetry Dashboard
Health, performance, and capacity decisions driven by structured `customDimensions` emitted by the KMP performance middleware (`telemetry_schema_version=1`).

Use the filters to scope by **time range**, **kingdom**, and the **projection multiplier** for scaling extrapolations. Methodology and data dictionary: [docs/7.8-performance-sizing.md](https://github.com/ansteorra/KMP/blob/main/docs/7.8-performance-sizing.md).

parameters.name: Kingdom
parameters.query: union (print kingdom='*'), (traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | extend kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom) | where isnotempty(kingdom) | summarize by kingdom) | order by kingdom asc

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize Requests = count()
content.title: Requests

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize ['p95 ms'] = round(percentile(duration_ms, 95), 1)
content.title: p95 duration (ms)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| where status >= 400
| summarize Errors = count()
content.title: Errors (4xx/5xx)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'telemetry-health'
| extend dropped = toint(customDimensions.dropped), failed = toint(customDimensions.failed)
| summarize ['Failed+Dropped'] = sum(failed) + sum(dropped)
content.title: Exporter dropped

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where severityLevel >= 2
| extend channel = tostring(customDimensions.channel)
| summarize events = count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), channel
| render columnchart
content.title: Errors and warnings over time

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'telemetry-health'
| extend
    sent = toint(customDimensions.sent),
    failed = toint(customDimensions.failed),
    dropped = toint(customDimensions.dropped),
    flush_count = toint(customDimensions.flush_count),
    flush_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.flush_total_ms),
    source_channel = tostring(customDimensions.source_channel)
| summarize
    Sent = sum(sent),
    Failed = sum(failed),
    Dropped = sum(dropped),
    Flushes = sum(flush_count),
    ['Avg flush ms'] = round(avg(flush_total_ms / iff(flush_count == 0, 1.0, todouble(flush_count))), 2)
    by ['Source channel'] = source_channel
| order by Sent desc
content.title: Telemetry exporter health (per source channel)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where severityLevel >= 2
| extend
    channel = tostring(customDimensions.channel),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path)
| project timestamp, ['Severity'] = severityLevel, channel, kingdom, route_template, path, message
| top 50 by timestamp desc
content.title: Recent errors and warnings

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize
    p50 = percentile(duration_ms, 50),
    p95 = percentile(duration_ms, 95),
    p99 = percentile(duration_ms, 99)
    by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Request latency percentiles (ms)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize rpm = count() by bin(timestamp, 1m)
| render timechart
content.title: Requests per minute

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| extend status_class = strcat(tostring(status / 100), 'xx')
| summarize count() by bin(timestamp, 15m), status_class
| render columnchart
content.title: HTTP status code mix

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize
    ['Requests'] = count(),
    ['p50 ms'] = round(percentile(duration_ms, 50), 1),
    ['p95 ms'] = round(percentile(duration_ms, 95), 1),
    ['p99 ms'] = round(percentile(duration_ms, 99), 1),
    ['Avg memory MB'] = round(avg(memory_peak_mb), 1)
    by ['Route'] = route_template
| top 20 by ['p95 ms'] desc
content.title: Top 20 slow routes (p95 by route_template)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| project timestamp, ['Duration ms'] = duration_ms, ['Route'] = route_template, ['Path'] = path, status, kingdom, host
| top 25 by ['Duration ms'] desc
content.title: Slowest individual requests (top 25)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize count() by ['Memory MB bucket'] = bin(memory_peak_mb, 8)
| order by ['Memory MB bucket'] asc
| render barchart
content.title: Memory peak distribution (MB)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| extend bucket = case(
    response_bytes < 1024, '<1 KB',
    response_bytes < 10240, '1-10 KB',
    response_bytes < 102400, '10-100 KB',
    response_bytes < 1048576, '100 KB - 1 MB',
    '>1 MB')
| summarize Responses = count() by ['Size bucket'] = bucket
| order by Responses desc
content.title: Response size distribution

content.json:
## Capacity signals
*Where time goes inside each request.* A large gap between wall and CPU time means the request is waiting on the database or external services - scaling app workers will not help; scaling the DB (or caching) will.

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize
    ['Wall p95'] = percentile(duration_ms, 95),
    ['CPU p95'] = percentile(cpu_user_ms + cpu_sys_ms, 95)
    by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: CPU vs wall time (p95, ms) - gap signals IO-bound work

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| where duration_ms > 0
| extend cpu_ratio = (cpu_user_ms + cpu_sys_ms) / duration_ms
| summarize
    Requests = count(),
    ['Avg ratio'] = round(avg(cpu_ratio), 3),
    ['p50 ratio'] = round(percentile(cpu_ratio, 50), 3),
    ['p95 ratio'] = round(percentile(cpu_ratio, 95), 3)
    by ['Route'] = route_template
| top 25 by ['Avg ratio'] asc
content.title: CPU efficiency (CPU ms / wall ms) - low value = waiting on IO

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize ['MB out'] = round(sum(response_bytes) / 1048576.0, 2) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart
content.title: Response bandwidth (MB)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize
    Requests = count(),
    ['Avg queries'] = round(avg(query_count), 1),
    ['Max queries'] = max(query_count),
    ['p95 db ms'] = round(percentile(db_total_ms, 95), 1),
    ['DB / wall %'] = round(avg(db_total_ms) / iff(avg(duration_ms) == 0, 1.0, avg(duration_ms)) * 100, 1)
    by ['Route'] = route_template
| top 25 by ['p95 db ms'] desc
content.title: DB pressure per route (queries and db_total_ms)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| extend bucket = case(
    query_count == 0, '0',
    query_count < 5, '1-4',
    query_count < 20, '5-19',
    query_count < 50, '20-49',
    query_count < 100, '50-99',
    '>=100')
| summarize Requests = count() by ['Queries'] = bucket
| order by ['Queries'] asc
content.title: Queries per request distribution

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize ['p95 MB'] = round(percentile(memory_peak_mb, 95), 1), Requests = count() by ['Route'] = route_template
| top 20 by ['p95 MB'] desc
content.title: Memory pressure per route (peak MB)

content.json:
## Scaling projection
*If today's traffic from one kingdom became `KingdomMultiplier` kingdoms with the same usage pattern.* Use these panels to size Azure/Vercel SKUs and Application Insights daily cap before onboarding new kingdoms.

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize
    Requests = count(),
    ['p95 ms'] = round(percentile(duration_ms, 95), 1),
    ['Avg memory MB'] = round(avg(memory_peak_mb), 1),
    ['Avg queries'] = round(avg(query_count), 1),
    ['MB out'] = round(sum(response_bytes) / 1048576.0, 2),
    ['Slow (>750ms)'] = countif(duration_ms > 750)
    by ['Kingdom'] = kingdom
| order by Requests desc
content.title: Per-kingdom traffic and performance

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize
    ['Current traces'] = count(),
    ['Projected traces'] = count() * toint('{KingdomMultiplier}'),
    ['Slow traces (>=750ms)'] = countif(duration_ms >= 750),
    ['Projected slow'] = countif(duration_ms >= 750) * toint('{KingdomMultiplier}'),
    ['Current MB out'] = round(sum(response_bytes) / 1048576.0, 2),
    ['Projected MB out'] = round(sum(response_bytes) / 1048576.0 * toint('{KingdomMultiplier}'), 2)
content.title: Trace volume projection at {KingdomMultiplier}x current kingdoms

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize Requests = count(), ['Total wall ms'] = sum(duration_ms), ['Total db ms'] = sum(db_total_ms) by ['Route'] = route_template
| extend
    ['Projected requests'] = Requests * toint('{KingdomMultiplier}'),
    ['Projected wall sec'] = round((['Total wall ms'] * toint('{KingdomMultiplier}')) / 1000.0, 1),
    ['Projected db sec'] = round((['Total db ms'] * toint('{KingdomMultiplier}')) / 1000.0, 1)
| project ['Route'], Requests, ['Projected requests'], ['Projected wall sec'], ['Projected db sec']
| top 20 by ['Projected wall sec'] desc
content.title: Routes contributing most projected load (top 20)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend channel = tostring(customDimensions.channel)
| summarize Events = count() by ['Channel'] = channel
| extend ['Projected at {KingdomMultiplier}x'] = Events * toint('{KingdomMultiplier}')
| order by Events desc
content.title: Trace ingestion projection by channel (events at {KingdomMultiplier}x)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'queries'
| project timestamp, message, ['Level'] = tostring(customDimensions.level)
| top 25 by timestamp desc
content.title: Recent SQL trace samples (redacted)

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange} | where tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'performance' and message startswith '[request_timing]' | extend
    duration_ms = todouble(customDimensions.duration_ms),
    memory_peak_mb = todouble(customDimensions.memory_peak_mb),
    cpu_user_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_user_ms),
    cpu_sys_ms = todouble(customDimensions.cpu_sys_ms),
    query_count = toint(customDimensions.query_count),
    db_total_ms = todouble(customDimensions.db_total_ms),
    response_bytes = toint(customDimensions.response_bytes),
    status = toint(customDimensions.status),
    kingdom = tostring(customDimensions.kingdom),
    route_template = tostring(customDimensions.route_template),
    method = tostring(customDimensions.method),
    host = tostring(customDimensions.host),
    path = tostring(customDimensions.path),
    app_version = tostring(customDimensions.app_version),
    php_version = tostring(customDimensions.php_version),
    php_sapi = tostring(customDimensions.php_sapi) | where "*" in ({Kingdom}) or kingdom in ({Kingdom})
| summarize ['Last seen'] = max(timestamp), Events = count() by app_version, php_version, php_sapi, ['PHP OS'] = tostring(customDimensions.php_os)
| order by ['Last seen'] desc
content.title: Runtime fingerprints observed

content.query:
traces | where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where severityLevel >= 2 and tostring(customDimensions.channel) == 'cli-errors'
| project timestamp, ['Level'] = severityLevel, message
| top 25 by timestamp desc
content.title: Latest CLI errors and warnings
